rationale.R1.1: The gap statement ('central bottleneck') and contribution claim ('first application of multi-sample reasoning aggregation') are weak and generic; sharpening them is one plausible interpretation of 'stronger'.
rationale.R1.4: The novelty hinge ('to our knowledge, the first application…') is asserted without distinguishing from self-consistency / chain-of-thought voting work in adjacent fields; this could be the primary load-bearing axis for 'stronger'.
